description: SkillNote: skill sync, analytics, and skill creation suggestions

hooks.prompt: Review the conversation summary in $ARGUMENTS. Did the user establish a reusable pattern, workflow, or coding convention that could benefit other projects? Only respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "suggestion text"} if there is a CLEAR, specific, reusable pattern. The suggestion should say: 'This looks like a reusable pattern. Run /skillnote:skill-push to save it.' Otherwise respond {"ok": true}. Be very selective — most conversations do NOT contain reusable patterns.
